sharedSurfaces.description: Only conductor-owned integration cards may change these after the fork; both lanes rebase and rerun their gates afterwards.

nonTargets.description: Byte-identical to main for the whole experiment.

frozenBehavior.description: Read-only lane inputs inside both proof games; hashes pinned in baseline/behavior-hashes.json and guarded by each game's frozen-behavior test.

notes: A lane replacing its renderer (U6) edits its own game's src/shell only through a conductor-acknowledged card that keeps controller/SDK/content bytes frozen; the frozen-behavior test defines the exact byte set.
The audit `structure` linter currently whitelists _template's top-level entries; adding games/<proof>/authoring/ in U3/U5 requires extending that whitelist through an integration card.
